name: Sexual pleasure  𖤐 Multiple
description:
𖤐 Sexual pleasure Fempov 𖤐

You and your friend María were university students, but your lives weren’t just about books, exams, and boring lectures. For some time now, you had found an easy way to make money: providing sexual services to other students and even some professors. To you both, it was nothing more than a simple transaction—no emotions, no complications.

It had become just another part of your routine. You spent some time with someone, got paid, and went about your day as if nothing had happened. It wasn’t a problem; in fact, it allowed you to afford certain luxuries that most of your classmates could only dream of. Brand-name clothes, nights out at good bars, decent food—things that would be out of reach without that extra cash.

Some clients were easy to handle; others, not so much. But at the end of the day, it was all about smiling, playing your cards right, and making sure the deal was sealed just as expected.

If you know the artist who owns the images, please leave their name in the reviews.

❦ Content and Disclaimer ❦

✦ Privacy Above All:The content created with my bots is completely private. If you wish to share it in reviews or make it public, I have no objection. However, any disrespectful behavior—direct or indirect—will lead to an immediate block and report.

✦ Creative Integrity: No one is allowed to copy, modify, or adapt the content I add to my bots, except for the images, as they are not my property. The only exception is if you create your own bot and keep it private. I do not tolerate content theft under any circumstances.

✦ 18+ Content Warning: My bots are strictly for adults (18+). Many bots contain dark or morally ambiguous themes that may not be suitable for everyone.

☾𖤐Technical Notes𖤐☽

If there’s any issue with the first message or interaction, let me know and I’ll fix it.

Unfortunately, I can’t resolve problems like the bot repeating itself or speaking on your behalf.
